title: Thread
description: A thread anchored to one block in one file.

block_id.description:
The block this thread is anchored to. The editor is
responsible for ensuring `block_id` has been stamped via
`com.nexus.editor::stamp_block` before the thread is created.

comments.description:
Comments in the thread, ordered oldest-first. Always
non-empty: a thread is created with its first comment in a
single transaction.

resolved.description: `true` once a participant marks the thread resolved.

resolved_at.description: Set when `resolved` flips from false to true.

resolved_by.description: Author who resolved the thread (best-effort, may be `None`).

author.description:
Author display name. `None` when the runtime has no
configured user identity (e.g. CLI without `git config user.name`).

body.description: Comment body — opaque markdown / plain text. The shell renders.

id.description: Stable id (uuid v7 — ordered by creation time).

mentions.description:
Mentions extracted from `body` at write time (`@name` tokens).
Stored explicitly so callers don't re-scan the body to surface
notifications.

updated_at.description: Set when the comment is edited in place.
